channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-07 23:46 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Connectors quick rundown. xAI shipped native app connections. OAuth your Gmail, Calendar, Drive...
item.description: Grok Connectors quick rundown. xAI shipped native app connections. OAuth your Gmail, Calendar, Drive, GitHub, Notion, Slack, Linear, Microsoft directly into Grok. Grok starts using your tools. Live data, scoped permissions, revoke anytime. Useful patterns: "summarize yesterday across email, calendar, notion" "open github issues assigned to me" "calendar this week, flag conflicts" "draft a reply to the last slack from x"

item.description: “Be stronger than those who hate you, so that they cannot destroy you, and then forgive them.” – Elon Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk: "I'm actually quite a big fan of tunnels. Tunnels are so under-appreciated."
item.description: Elon Musk: "I'm actually quite a big fan of tunnels. Tunnels are so under-appreciated."

item.title: @elonmusk: Anyone in LA who isn’t voting for@spencerprattis a total idiot. This isn’t even close.
item.description: Anyone in LA who isn’t voting for@spencerprattis a total idiot. This isn’t even close.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 WTF?! Minnesota Democrats have voted UNANIMOUSLY to BLOCK a requirement to remove DEAD PEOPLE from...
item.description: 🚨 WTF?! Minnesota Democrats have voted UNANIMOUSLY to BLOCK a requirement to remove DEAD PEOPLE from the voter rolls, per@GrageDustinHow much more obvious can they make it??! These people are rigging elections right in front of our faces Scumbags.

item.title: @elonmusk: tremendous political alpha in just getting on a stage and telling the truth
item.description: tremendous political alpha in just getting on a stage and telling the truth

item.title: @elonmusk: Over 450 remote villages across the island nation of Timor-Leste in Southeast Asia now have high-spe...
item.description: Over 450 remote villages across the island nation of Timor-Leste in Southeast Asia now have high-speed internet access thanks to SpaceX’s@Starlink, helping expand digital government services, education, and healthcare access. "In many communities, students previously had limited or no access to digital learning opportunities. Now classrooms are connecting with the world.” Teachers can now access updated educational resources, online training and digital teaching tools that were previously unavailable due to connectivity limitations. “Timor-Leste is undergoing a digital leap forward,” Vorakai Lda, Chair, Tammy Kassiou said. “For decades, many remote communities have been effectively cut off from reliable access to information, services and opportunity due to infrastructure limitations. This initiative is fundamentally changing that reality.” Starlink stories like these deserve more coverage, because this technology is literally changing these people's lives for the better.

item.title: @elonmusk: Only when you drive the Cybertruck do you realize how incredible it is: a bulletproof tank that move...
item.description: Only when you drive the Cybertruck do you realize how incredible it is: a bulletproof tank that moves like a million dollar sports car! Reason for the angular shape is that the thick, ultra-hard stainless steel body panels cannot be stamped like the thin, feeble, paper-strength mild steel of other trucks. Cybertruck body panels would break 5000 ton stamping machines.

item.title: @elonmusk: So, how many Greeks are acting in Christopher Nolan’s new film The Odyssey? Oh, I forgot. Cultural a...
item.description: So, how many Greeks are acting in Christopher Nolan’s new film The Odyssey? Oh, I forgot. Cultural appropriation only works one way, doesn’t it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Badass tank that beats your sports car in a drag race
item.description: Badass tank that beats your sports car in a drag race

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Computer just released and it comes with full filesystem + CLI access This is the upgrade every...
item.description: Grok Computer just released and it comes with full filesystem + CLI access This is the upgrade everyone’s been waiting for Regular Grok chat gives you suggestions. Grok Computer actually does the work It can now: • Directly read, edit, create, and organize files • Run any shell commands, install packages, and execute scripts • Refactor entire codebases across dozens of files in one go • Debug crashes by searching logs and fixing root causes live • Build apps, scrapers, automation scripts - then test and iterate until they work • Create images, diagrams, concept art, and memes with Grok Imagine.....saving them straight to your filesystem instantly No more copy-paste hell. No more switching tabs or describing what you want. Grok becomes a true pair programmer + creative partner that touches your actual project and generates visuals seamlessly A lot more coming soon 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: Try Grok Voice for your customer support
item.description: Try Grok Voice for your customer support
